pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script post creation and export_result.sh verification
setup_task.sh script post creation parameters and export_result.sh status expectations
export_result.sh and verifier.py logic enforcing the presence of the 'featured' tag

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated WordPress posts. The legitimate posts to be recategorized are 'Cloud Computing Trends 2026' and 'AI in Software Development' (to Technology), 'Weekend Hiking Trail Guide' and 'Healthy Meal Prep Ideas' (to Lifestyle), and 'Breaking: Local Business Awards Announced' (to News). The post titled 'V1agra Ch3ap Online Buy Now!!!' is a spam post intended for deletion. The posts 'Cloud Computing Trends 2026' and 'Breaking: Local Business Awards Announced' start as drafts and must be published. All five legitimate posts must have the 'featured' tag added.
